---
title: "Load Data"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
data <- read.csv("~/projects/group_22_project/_raw/Brauer2008_DataSet1.csv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")
data[3, ]

```

```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(reshape2)

```
